name: @tootallnate/ff8-field
description: Pure-JS parser for Final Fantasy VIII PC + Switch Remastered field-scene formats. Decodes `.map` (tile layout) + `.mim` (texture pages + palettes) and composites them into a 2D RGBA image — the pre-rendered backgrounds you walk around on (Balamb Garden, Dollet town, Galbadia Hotel, etc.). Supports both the older 401,408-byte MIM (16 palettes × 12 texture pages) and newer 438,272-byte MIM (24 palettes × 13 texture pages), both Tile1 (PSX-era 16 bytes) and Tile2 (PC/Switch 16 bytes with layerID + blendType) records, and the 4-, 8-, and 16-bpp texture-page formats.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
